title: Purnurpler's Cobblemon Additions
description: Various fakemon that I wanted to add. Currently contains one OC and all the elemental warriors from Kameo: Elements of Power.
body:
Various fakemon that I wanted to add. Currently contains one OC and all the elemental warriors and maybe other things from Kameo: Elements of Power. 

# How to Install
Add the updated .zip file to both "resourcepacks" folder and, when creating a world or server, to "datapacks" folder (For singleplayer you have to go into the saves folder and locate the worlds specific datapacks folder, not the modpacks).

## Current Mons
- Dat Man
- Flex
- Thermite
- Rubble
- Pummel Weed
- 40 Below
- Snare
- Chilla
- Major Ruin
- Deep Blue
- Ash
- Lord Drok

## Quick Tips
The Kameo Cobblemon can only be naturally found in their low lvl sprite form (except for those that do not have a sprite form). To get their full form you must level them to lvl40. 

## Contact
DM me on discord for any bugs/ideas, @purnurpler. Keep in mind I am a one-man army who only really knows how to model/texture/animate, so nothing bonkers banana. Don't ask me to add any actual pokemon that's not my goal, unless there is one I want badly enough.
